default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Talal by identifying key process gaps and areas for improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process Gaps:** Critical workflows, like content audits and strategy, are inconsistent and ad hoc, leading to lost knowledge and inefficient execution.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Quality Decline:** Content quality dropped post-Aerobs-to-Atlas migration, with Atlas producing more hallucinations, redundancy, and poor technical writing.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [**Strategic Initiatives:** Jakub is leading efforts to standardize processes (Organic Strategy Framework), build a central playbook library, and create a data-backed experiment tracker.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Talal's Role:** Use a fresh, client-agnostic perspective to standardize workflows, document best practices, and help execute strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

## Topics

### Process Gaps & Inconsistencies

  - [**Problem:** Rapid growth outpaced process standardization, creating inconsistent, ad hoc workflows that waste resources and prevent scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Example 1: Content Audits**](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**Issue:** No standard process for content audits and refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**Resource:** Jakub created a V1 playbook (using ChatGPT) for Ada and Eric, which Talal will review and improve.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [**Example 2: Organic Content Strategy**](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [**Issue:** Inconsistent keyword research and clustering methods across MEs.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [**Worst Practice:** Exporting raw SEMrush lists (300–3,000 keywords) for clients to sort.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
      - [**Best Practice:** Matt's Interwell process, which translates high-level goals into organized topics.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [**Resource:** Jakub is developing an Organic Strategy Framework to standardize this.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Content Quality Decline (Aerobs → Atlas)

  - [**Problem:** Content quality declined significantly after the migration from Aerobs to Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [**Specific Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Hallucinations:** Made-up stats and irrelevant citations.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Redundancy:** Repetitive language, especially in longer articles.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Technical Writing:** Struggles with complex topics (e.g., Flowsome, Webstack).](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Cannibalization:** New content competes with existing pages, wasting resources.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [**Resolution Process:** MEs flag issues via tickets to ENG or discuss workarounds in Slack (e.g., using Cloud projects).](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

### Strategic Initiatives

  - [**1. Playbook Library:**](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Goal:** Centralize all successful, client-agnostic workflows (e.g., audits, refreshes) into a single, searchable database.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture and scale knowledge that is currently lost after one-off client use.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Long-Term Vision:** A public-facing library for lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**2. Experiment Tracker:**](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create a data-backed database of proven SEO/CRO experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Move from ideas to validated results to confidently recommend tactics to all clients.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [**Method:** Systematically track experiments across clients to gather shareable data for marketing (e.g., LinkedIn, webinars).](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**3. Cross-Client Data Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
      - [**Issue:** No macro-level analysis of performance data (e.g., GSC, GA) across clients.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
      - [**Status:** A project by Panzer may be in progress; integration with Atlas dashboards is a potential path.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jakub:** Share the V1 Content Audit Playbook and the Organic Strategy Framework draft with Talal.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [**Talal:**](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [Review and improve the V1 Content Audit Playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the Organic Strategy Framework draft.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Work with Jakub to execute strategic initiatives (Playbook Library, Experiment Tracker).](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
      - [Take on ad hoc client projects (e.g., audits) to build new, documented playbooks.](https://fathom.video/share/JY-LiF9cPPa522iB1o3n46eaAKyco59p?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

action_items.description: Share content audit playbook w/ Talal via Slack
Grant Talal access to organic strategy framework doc
